name: Guidde
description: Guidde — AI-powered product documentation tool that auto-generates step-by-step video guides from screen recordings.

seo.title: Guidde — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Guidde: Guidde — AI-powered product documentation tool that auto-generates step-by-step video guides from screen recordings.

when_to_use: Auto-generate product walkthrough videos from screen recording
Step-by-step video guides for customer onboarding
Internal process documentation via screen capture AI
Knowledge base enrichment with visual how-to guides
Reduce support tickets with self-serve video documentation

cons: Editing flexibility limited vs real video tools
review.verdict: A real time-saver for product and CS teams—accept that the output isn't Hollywood.
review.best_for: CS and enablement teams churning out SaaS how-to videos quickly
review.not_for: Marketing teams wanting high-production hero videos
